data.description: China Seeks Trade Edge by Shunning US Soy in First Since 1990s: Ahead of Trump-Xi Calls China has not bought any US soybeans at the start of the export season for the first time since records began in 1999, signaling it is using agriculture as leverage in its trade fight with

data.title: 2025 World Manufacturing Convention in Hefei, China to showcase smart manufacturing and frontier tech from Sept 20-23.
data.description: The 2025 World Manufacturing Convention is scheduled to take place in Hefei, China from September 20 to 23. This event, which will be held in the capital of Anhui Province in eastern China, will spotlight advanced manufacturing and cutting-edge technologies. The theme for this convention is "Smart Manufacturing."

data.title: AvePoint becomes first B2B SaaS stock on SGX with dual listing on Nasdaq and SGX, continuing global expansion.
data.description: A groundbreaking milestone was achieved by a company becoming the first B2B SaaS stock to be listed on the SGX. Additionally, this company made history by being the first to have a dual listing on both the Nasdaq and SGX. This significant move has garnered attention in the business world and marks a new chapter for the company.

data.title: GDX ETF switching to new index, raises questions on portfolio impact, affecting investors. Read on for details.
data.description: The GDX, which is the VanEck Gold Miners ETF, is set to begin following a different index in the near future. This development has sparked interest in assessing the alterations that will occur in its portfolio and the potential consequences for investors.

data.title: Stock market hits record highs as major indexes soar, led by Palantir and Spotify, with 7 new buys added.
data.description: Stock market indexes reached all-time highs driven by positive developments, including a significant deal involving Nvidia and the Federal Reserve's actions on the second day. Palantir and Spotify were among the leaders in new purchases. This surge led to Dow Jones Futures soaring, with Palantir standing out among the seven new investments made.

data.title: Securities class action lawsuit filed against Lockheed Martin (LMT) urging investors with losses to contact Hagens Berman before Sept. 26th deadline.
data.description: Investors who have incurred losses should reach out to Hagens Berman before the September 26th deadline regarding the securities class action lawsuit against Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT). The lawsuit was filed on behalf of investors and pertains to losses associated with the corporation.

data.title: North Coast Brewing Company wins bronze for Laguna Baja brew in European Beer Star 2025 with 2,200 beers competing.
data.description: In Fort Bragg, California on September 18, 2025, the North Coast Brewing Company (NCBC) secured a bronze medal at the esteemed European Beer Star 2025 competition for their Laguna Baja Mexican-style dark lager. The event featured nearly 2,200 beers vying for top honors across 74 diverse categories.
